commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

commit.message:
Remap knobs: E4=vertical scale, E5=gain/threshold, E7/E8=twist actions

- E3: zoom only (removed shift+E3 vertical scale)
- E4: vertical scale for all modes (was shift+E3)
- E5: gain/normalize in trim/loop, threshold in slice auto (was E4)
- E7 touch+twist: toggle loop on/off
- E8 touch+twist: snap to zero crossing
- Twist prompts stay visible while knob is touched
- Add snapToZeroCrossing() helper function
- Recording waveform: scrolling write-head visualization
- Recording stop: poll for sampler finalization before loading
- Shift+pad preview: 5% of selection, clamped 0.25s-5s
- Update help.json for new knob layout

repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: run bot and web server in single asyncio event loop for Linux compatibility

python-telegram-bot v20+ requires signal handlers in the main thread, which
caused a crash when the bot ran in a background thread on Railway (Linux).
Refactored run.py to use asyncio.run() with uvicorn.Server.serve() and the
bot running concurrently via async context manager.

commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(dashboard): GPU-accelerated WAV-loop, DataCache, Fase C.3

- Add _DataCache: background thread fetches ~30 data sources every 1s,
  UI reads instantly from cache (zero-blocking tab refreshes)
- Add _ollama_verify(): local Ollama verification (gemma3:4b → llava fallback)
  with keep_alive=10m, num_predict=20 for <1s V-step on GPU
- Pre-warm gemma3:4b on startup to avoid 30s cold-start
- Convert ALL 7 tabs + status bar to _cache.get() pattern
- Enhance CentralBrain system prompt with T1-T5 Cortex Knowledge Core
- Add "test jezelf" tool execution instructions to system prompt
- Fase C.3: move oracle.py + ultimate_hunt.py from /core/ to /brain/
- Fix tool_choice, add fallback text→tool parser, fuzzy tool matching
- Fix key-mismatch bugs in Agents/Brain/Immune/Memory/Observatory tabs

Diagnosed & resolved: Smart App Control (WDAC) blocking Ollama CUDA DLLs
→ 0/35 GPU layers → 35/35 GPU layers (4225MB VRAM, 100% offload)
→ V-step: 33s (CPU) → <1s (GPU) — 30x speedup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: SSH server picker (#), crash-proof storage, MCP hardening, security fixes (v5.25.3)

- SSH server picker: type # in chat input to attach SSH hosts via popup with search
- Atomic file writes for auth data — prevents corruption on unexpected shutdown
- MCP initialization guards: all MCP servers require initialize before tools/list and tools/call
- MCP stdin buffer overflow protection (10 MB limit) across all 3 MCP helpers
- AbortController listener leak fix — properly removed on process close/error
- Buffer overflow handling: process complete lines before discarding oversized buffer
- Duplicate session ID prevention: onSessionId fires only once
- Skills merge (not replace): auto-classified skills merge into existing selection
- UI state validation: mode/model/agent values validated before applying
- Paragraph breaks between tool calls: proper spacing in streamed text
- Larger image preview: expanded from 320x260 to min(900px,80vw) x min(700px,70vh)
- Markdown table fix: inline header splitting no longer corrupts lines starting with |
- XSS fix: image type attribute escaped in history render
- CSS.escape for task IDs in chain progress card selectors
- Download filename sanitization against path traversal
- Auth path normalization: trailing slashes stripped in middleware
- MCP tool names: using proper mcp__<server>__<tool> format in allowedTools
- Hidden internal tools (set_ui_state, ask_user, notify_user) from UI tool cards
- Context tokens null safety, Telegram duration null safety
- Updated all README files (EN, UA, RU) with new features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(portal): onboarding loop + calendar events + data cleanup

Parte 1 — Onboarding redirect fix:
- ClientPortalOnboarding now accepts userId prop (from server auth)
- finish() uses prop userId directly instead of reading from localStorage,
  eliminating race condition where userId was null at completion time
- layout.tsx passes userId to PortalChrome; bidirectional guard added:
  (1) done + on onboarding → redirect to /portal
  (2) not done + elsewhere in portal → redirect to /portal/onboarding
- onboarding/page.tsx passes user.id as prop to ClientPortalOnboarding

Parte 2 — Calendar: Novo Evento modal + localStorage persistence:
- Added NovoEventoModal component (date/time/subject/notes fields)
- Events persisted in calendar_events_${userId} via clientKey()
- Load from localStorage on mount
- "Novo Evento" button in header alongside existing Calendly button

Parte 7 — Limpeza:
- mock-data.ts: replaced fake contact "João Mendes" → "Tiago Fonseca"
- NotificationPanel.tsx: replaced "Teaser Porto V3.mp4" and fake
  people references (Ana Silva, João M.) with real Beyond Focus content

Parts 3-6 were already complete in previous sessions.

commit.message:
Voeg geschatte actuele COP sensor toe en slope-ratio analyse

Fix 404 on team view page: disambiguate profiles FK relationship

foreign keys exist between fantasy_teams and profiles. Use the
explicit hint `profiles!fantasy_teams_user_id_fkey` to resolve.

auto-cleanup of saved clips every 5 minutes, and click analysis tool.
Retrained model with social media hard negatives (99% accuracy).

commit.message:
Fix tray piece remaining visible during Tetris fall

The placed piece's tray slot was only cleared inside afterSettle(),
which runs after the gravity animation completes. Now state.next[idx]
and drawTray() are called immediately alongside cleanupDrag() before
animateFall(), so the slot empties the moment the piece is placed.

Add auto-update notification system

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Fix rental subtotal calculation for weekly/monthly bookings

The rental subtotal was always computed as pricePerDay * totalDays,
which gave wrong amounts for weekly/monthly rates (e.g. $1/day * 31
= $31 instead of $3.01/month * 1 = $3.01).

- Add pricePerUnit and rentalSubtotal fields to Booking model
- Store actual per-unit rate and rental subtotal at booking creation
- Update Checkout, MyBookings, ReservationDetail, Payouts,
  HostBookings, and HostReservationDetail to display correct
  rate/unit labels (e.g. "$2.00/week" instead of "$1.00/day")
- Update insurance route, scheduler, and connect route to use
  stored rentalSubtotal with fallback for legacy bookings

commit.message:
Support module description fields (#358)

* Support module description fields (#357)

Parse Haddock module header fields (Module, Description, Copyright,
License, Maintainer, Stability, Portability) from module documentation
comments and render them as a definition list prepended to the module
documentation. This means they appear as a <dl> in HTML output and as
a DefList doc node in JSON output, with no changes needed to the Module
type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use Internal.appendDoc and case-insensitive field names

Address PR feedback:
- Replace prependDoc with existing Internal.appendDoc
- Make module header field name matching case-insensitive
- Add test for case-insensitive field names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Allow space before colon in module header fields

Support field headers like `Description : foo` in addition to
`Description: foo`. Splits matching into field name lookup followed
by whitespace-then-colon check.
